messages.body: Hi Jack,    Jeevesh here from Zoca Social Media. We're currently on the call and would love for you to join us when you’re able. Please let us know if you can make it!
Hey, We have a meeting scheduled. Will you be joining? I’m currently waiting in the meeting room.

Hey Jack,  Gurvinder this side from the social media team. I wanted to check if you’re running any special offers or promotions for the upcoming events: - Thanksgiving - Black Friday - Christmas  If not, would you like u…

Hello? Hi. Do you mind if I put this here? Thank you. No, you're all good. I just want to, I'm going to use the restroom. You don't mind watching my stuff. Yeah. Thank you. So, yeah, I think that there's a little network…

Hi. Hello. Hi, Jack. Can you hear me? Hi. How are you? I am good. We just have the Diwali celebration going on in India. I know we had the festivals, but I wanted to make sure that I can still connect with you because th…
